summary: Promoted ADR 0317 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.137` and platform version `0.130.86` after replaying the direct Keycloak admin-API provisioning fallback from a clean exact-main worktree, preserving the repo-managed recovery evidence for the recovered Keycloak runtime, and proving that `scripts/provision_operator.py` now reuses the shared `.local/` controller secrets tree correctly from dedicated git worktrees while supporting no-email verification replays.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported release blockers `met`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-release-status-r1.json`, and `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --released-on 2026-04-02 --platform-impact 'Restored the Keycloak direct-API operator provisioning fallback and verified the worktree-safe replay path.'` cut release `0.177.137`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-release-manager-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main provisioning replay without duplicate email
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/provision_operator.py --id matei-busui-tmp-001 --name 'Matei Busui' --email busui.matei1994@gmail.com --username matei.busui-tmp --role admin --expires 2026-04-08T00:00:00Z --requester florin@badita.org --skip-email` succeeded from the clean exact-main worktree, reused the shared password file, and reverified the live admin role/group assignments without resending credentials, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-provision-operator-r1.txt`.

After the release cut, platform-version bump, ADR metadata refresh, and canonical-truth regeneration, `make validate` passed on the integrated release tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-validate-r4.txt`.

`make remote-validate` passed with explicit lanes `repository-structure-and-schema`, `generated-artifact-and-canonical-truth`, `service-syntax-and-unit`, and `remote-builder`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed with the primary-branch lane bundle, including documentation, generated-doc, schema, policy, IaC, security-scan, semgrep, and integration-test checks, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`.

notes: This receipt records the exact-main promotion for ADR 0317 after the earlier branch-local recovery and worktree-path correction loop had already restored the live Keycloak runtime and proven the fallback from a non-canonical worktree.

The first clean-tree `make validate` run (`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-validate-r1.txt`) truthfully failed on the receipt-schema enum, and the next two runs (`r2`, `r3`) truthfully failed while the exact-main release and generated-truth surfaces were still being brought into sync; the final `r4` pass therefore captures the fully integrated state rather than hiding the intermediate correction loops.

After updating the mainline receipt and workstream note with those final gate outputs, the narrower `agent-standards + workstream-surfaces + data-models + generated-docs` slice still passed, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-mainline-final-slice-r1.txt`.

correction_loop.repair_action: Cut repository version 0.177.137 from the exact-main integration tree, advanced ADR/workstream/live-apply metadata into the live-applied state, and prepared the canonical receipt plus platform-version bump so the final post-release validation can confirm the integrated truth surfaces.
